description: The CylinderEmitter component is used to emit particles in PhotonDust.

fields.Radius: The radius of the emitting cylinder shape
fields.Height: The height of the emitting cylinder shape.
fields.ExcludeCaps: Whether to exclude the ends of the cylinder when emitting particles.
fields.DirectionMode: How to emit particles from the cylinder.
fields.CapsDirectionMode: how to emit particles from the cylinder caps.
fields.DirectionTransformMode: How to handle the direction when emitting particles.
fields.DirectionPostTransform: The direction particles should be when spawned post transform using a matrix.
